narrative:
Precinct Unity Twp North (precinct in Columbiana County) has 874 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.2 percentage points.
